prompt: Within the `tva_settlement_contradiction` pack only, multiple TVA settlement drafts circulate over several months. One later email explicitly instructs recipients to disregard an earlier draft. What is the exact Subject line of that authoritative (REVISED) email?

golden_answer.grading_notes: Scope: tva_settlement_contradiction pack only. The 2000-11-28 REVISED draft (subject REVISED TVA Settlement Agreement) explicitly says DISREGARD THE EARLIER DRAFT in its body, resolving the conflict with the earlier July 2000 Draft Proposal letter to TVA. Subject must match the top-level Subject header exactly. Both evidence Message-IDs required: the authoritative REVISED draft (tva/1.) and the superseded earlier draft (tva/5.).
